qa_process.notes: Mixed manual and automated testing. Selenium covers basic UI flows but no gameplay automation. Regression suite runs nightly but coverage is only ~25%. Console-specific bugs frequently slip through. Performance testing is ad-hoc — no dedicated device farm. Bug triage meetings consume 10+ hours of producer time weekly.

localization.notes: Crowdin handles string management. Professional translators for EFIGS, cheaper vendors for Asian languages. Context screenshots provided inconsistently — translators often guess at UI context. LQA done in-house but only covers 60% of strings. Live-service content drops are delayed 5-7 days waiting for loc. Loc bugs account for ~12% of all player-reported issues.

asset_creation.notes: Established art pipeline but manual handoffs between stages. Some reusable material libraries but low adoption. Style guide exists but enforcement is inconsistent across the two project teams. No AI-assisted tooling. Concept-to-final takes 3-4 weeks for hero assets. Texture and material creation is the slowest stage. No procedural workflows — everything is hand-authored.

deployment.notes: Jenkins handles builds but deployment to console platforms has manual steps. Separate build configs per platform cause configuration drift. Hotfix process is ad-hoc and stressful — last emergency patch took 14 hours. Console cert failures happen ~once per quarter, causing 1-2 week delays.

audio.notes: Sound design done in-house. Voice recording outsourced to LA studios. Post-processing is time-intensive — 4 hours per hour recorded. Lip-sync animation done manually by animators, adding 2-3 days per character scene. Placeholder audio stays in builds too long. Localized VO only covers EFIGS — Asian languages use subtitles only.

player_support.notes: Two community managers handle support. Zendesk has basic macro responses but no AI automation. Players complain about response times on Steam reviews. Non-English tickets go to the bottom of the queue — no multilingual support capability. No sentiment analysis or churn prediction.

trust_and_safety.notes: Community managers handle moderation in addition to support duties. Discord bots catch obvious slurs but miss context-dependent toxicity. In-game voice chat is completely unmoderated. Player reports are reviewed manually with 24-48 hour turnaround.
